# Hellas Reform

> Architecture and total renovations in Athens and Attica — for homes, apartments and commercial spaces. Custom carpentry and metal constructions, prime kitchens and bathrooms, project management and permits, from first idea to handover. One responsible contact throughout. TCG registered.

> Η Hellasreform προσφέρει αρχιτεκτονική και ολοκληρωμένες ανακαινίσεις στην Αθήνα και την Αττική — για κατοικίες, διαμερίσματα και επαγγελματικούς χώρους. Ξυλουργικές και μεταλλικές κατασκευές, prime κουζίνες και μπάνια, διαχείριση έργου και άδειες, με μία υπεύθυνη επαφή. Εγγεγραμμένοι στο ΤΕΕ. Δωρεάν προσφορά.

Brand: Hellas Reform (one-word wordmark: Hellasreform). This site is Hellas Reform Athens, part of the Hellas Reform network.

## Contact

- Website: https://hellasreform.gr/
- Email: info@hellasreform.gr
- Phone: +30 210 300 99 19
- Location: Ermou 56, 10563, Athens, Greece

## Services

- Total renovation & project management — complete renovations for homes, apartments and commercial spaces, from first concept to handover
- Architecture & design — architecture, layout, material direction and design decisions for renovation projects
- Prime kitchens & bathrooms — kitchens and bathrooms designed as central parts of the renovation
- Custom carpentry & metal constructions — bespoke wardrobes, storage, built-ins, furniture and custom metal constructions
- Technical checks & permits — technical checks, permit coordination and engineer procedures

## Pages

- [Home](https://hellasreform.gr/): Services, process, gallery and contact form
- [Blog](https://hellasreform.gr/blog/): Renovation guides and articles for Athens
- [Cities / Πόλεις](https://hellasreform.gr/cities/): Service areas
- [Partners / Συνεργάτες](https://hellasreform.gr/partners/): Collaborating professionals

## Blog Articles

- [Άδεια Ανακαίνισης Αττική: Πλήρης Οδηγός](https://hellasreform.gr/blog/adeia-anakainisis-attiki/): When you need a small-scale works permit or building permit for renovation in Attica, and what documents are required.
- [Ανακαίνιση Airbnb Αθήνα 2026: Κανόνες & Κόστος](https://hellasreform.gr/blog/anakainisi-airbnb-athina/): Airbnb property renovation in Athens: 2026 regulations, fire safety, energy certificates, upgrade costs and practical tips.
- [Ανακαίνιση Διαμερίσματος Αθήνα 2026](https://hellasreform.gr/blog/anakainisi-diamerismatos-athina/): Apartment renovation in Athens: building regulations, permitted work hours, permits, insurance and what to know before starting.
- [Ανακαίνιση Κουζίνας Αθήνα: Τιμές 2026](https://hellasreform.gr/blog/anakainisi-kouzinas-athina/): Kitchen renovation prices in Athens 2026: material options, ergonomic design, appliances and custom-built solutions.
- [Ανακαίνιση Μπάνιου Αθήνα: Κόστος 2026](https://hellasreform.gr/blog/anakainisi-mpaniou-athina/): Bathroom renovation costs in Athens 2026: waterproofing, timeline, trade coordination and tips for getting accurate quotes.
- [Ανακαίνιση Νεοκλασικού Αθήνα: Οδηγός 2026](https://hellasreform.gr/blog/anakainisi-neoklasiki-katoikia/): Guide to renovating a neoclassical home in Athens while preserving architectural features, approvals and modern upgrades.
- [Ανακαινίζω Νοικιάζω 2026: Οδηγός Επιδότησης](https://hellasreform.gr/blog/anakainizo-noikiazo-2026/): Anakainizo-Noikiazo 2026 subsidy guide: up to 40% funding for rental property renovation, eligibility and application steps.
- [Ειδικές Ξυλουργικές Κατασκευές Αθήνα](https://hellasreform.gr/blog/eidiki-kataskevi-epipla/): Custom carpentry in Athens: built-in wardrobes, bookshelves, wall panelling and storage designed for your space.
- [Εξοικονομώ & Ενεργειακή Αναβάθμιση Αθήνα](https://hellasreform.gr/blog/exoikonomo-energeiaki-anakainisi/): Exoikonomw energy upgrade guide for Athens homes: windows, insulation, heating systems and preparing your application.
- [Έξυπνο Σπίτι & Ανακαίνιση Αθήνα: Οδηγός 2026](https://hellasreform.gr/blog/exypno-spiti-anakainisi/): Smart home guide for Athens renovations: lighting, heating, shading, security and networking integration.
- [Κόστος Ανακαίνισης Αθήνα 2026: Τιμές ανά τ.μ.](https://hellasreform.gr/blog/kostos-anakainisis-athina-2026/): Renovation costs in Athens 2026: price per sqm, trade costs, materials and hidden expenses. Complete pricing guide.
- [Ολική Ανακαίνιση Αθήνα: Κόστος & Διαδικασία](https://hellasreform.gr/blog/oliki-anakainisi-athina/): Full renovation guide for Athens: cost per sqm, work sequence, timeline and project management.
